projectDescription: An AI-powered desktop assistant with voice input and chat capabilities built with Tauri, Next.js, and Groq API
keyFeatures: Voice recording and transcription with Groq Whisper model
Real-time AI chat responses via Letta agents
Animated mascot character with interactive states
Keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+Opt+V for voice, Cmd+Opt+T for chat)
publicApiSurface: Tauri command: transcribe - Converts audio to text using Groq API
Tauri command: process_audio - Processes raw audio samples to WAV format
React hook: useVoiceRecorder - Manages audio recording and transcription
Function: generate_response - Streams AI responses from Letta agents
Component: AnimatedVectorBox - Main UI component with animated mascot
